title: dicksonia externa
intro: Dicksonia externa, also known as the silver fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dicksonia externa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Dicksonia externa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
